scripts.server: python -c "from pathlib import Path; import uvicorn; env = {}; env_path = Path('.env'); [env.setdefault(line.split('=',1)[0].strip(), line.split('=',1)[1].strip()) for line in env_path.read_text().splitlines() if '=' in line and not line.strip().startswith('#')]; uvicorn.run('app.main:app', host='127.0.0.1', port=int(env.get('SERVER_PORT', '4000')))"
scripts.server:dev: python -c "from pathlib import Path; import uvicorn; env = {}; env_path = Path('.env'); [env.setdefault(line.split('=',1)[0].strip(), line.split('=',1)[1].strip()) for line in env_path.read_text().splitlines() if '=' in line and not line.strip().startswith('#')]; uvicorn.run('app.main:app', host='127.0.0.1', port=int(env.get('SERVER_PORT', '4000')), reload=True, reload_dirs=['app'])"
